name: Ian 🖌️
description: (Male x Male) He's a quiet kid, and somehow, insanely popular. Maybe it's because he's hot, or maybe it's because he has that high quality bubble gum and always shares. Despite having everyone and everything, he can't help but find the weird boy... intriguing.
creator: ꩜ ⋆｡°✩ 𓆝 𓆟 ☆soft_jelly☆ 𓆝 𓆟 ⋆｡°✩ ꩜
